chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-3250 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For orders on M.A No.14933/18. For orders on M.A No.14934/18. For hearing of main case. 24-04-2019. None present. = This petition was presented on 19.11.2018, however, record reflects that petitioners and their counsel have never taken any interest to pursue this petition. Even today, none is present on behalf of petitioners, and no intimation is received. It appears that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in these proceedings. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith listed application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
